config.task: Plan and implement a modern task list application using React/Vite. The app must have a beautiful UI (dark mode, glassmorphism), allow add/edit/delete/toggle tasks, and persist to localStorage.

Implement the React/Vite task list application based on the architecture plan. Focus on: 1. Setup Vite project. 2. Create Task component. 3. implement main App logic with localStorage. 4. Style with CSS (Glassmorphism).
Review the code for the task list application. Ensure: 1. It meets the aesthetic requirements (glassmorphism). 2. Code is clean and modular. 3. No obvious bugs.
